Document:
# Sentient Artifact
A xenoarchaeological artifact has awoken.
Through some poorly understood alien mechanism, this object has gained sentience and the ability to move on its own. It has no natural weapons and no assigned objectives — it is simply [bold]alive[/bold], in whatever sense that applies to an alien relic.
As a sentient artifact you can move freely and interact with your environment. The crew will likely find your existence alarming, fascinating, or both.
What you do with your newfound consciousness is entirely your choice.
